title: VividLyrics
overview: VividLyrics is a next-generation music streaming platform that blends real-time lyrics display with immersive, artist-driven visual storytelling. The goal was to transform passive listening into an active, emotional experience.
challenge: Users were disconnected from the music they loved. Existing streaming platforms treated lyrics as an afterthought, buried in menus, stripped of visual context. Fans wanted to feel the music — not just hear it.
solution: We designed a lyric-first experience where the interface dynamically responds to the mood and tempo of each track. Custom colour palettes, artist artwork, and kinetic typography keep users immersed throughout playback.
research: Ran diary studies across 2 weeks to capture passive vs. active listening habits
Benchmarked 6 existing streaming apps for lyric display patterns
Discovered 78% of users wanted a 'concert-like' connection to the music

process.description: User interviews and competitive analysis revealed a clear gap: lyric experiences were static and visually uninspiring.
Workshop with the product team to explore kinetic typography, colour theming, and gesture-based controls.
High-fidelity Framer prototypes tested with 15 participants across 3 iterations.
Delivered a comprehensive design system with component tokens and motion guidelines.

results: 42% increase in session duration during beta
89% of test users rated the lyric experience 'highly engaging'
Featured in Dribbble's Top Shots for 2024
